query:
SELECT 
  b.id as portalBookingId,
  b.ptsRef,
  b.bookingRef,
  b.clientName,
  b.clientEmail,
  b.destination,
  b.departureDate,
  b.returnDate,
  b.totalValue,
  b.depositAmount,
  b.status,
  b.paymentStatus,
  b.numTravellers,
  b.packageType,
  b.supplierName,
  b.notes,
  b.createdAt,
  b.bookingDate
FROM bookings b
WHERE b.userId = 60600
ORDER BY b.departureDate DESC
LIMIT 100;
